- 2010-06-11 Agenda Record of Proceedings Invitation to Participate in Workshop Teleconference Participation: To participate by teleconference in the Scientific Advisory Panel on Bioequivalence Requirements for Modified-Release Dosage Forms (SAP-MRDF) Workshop, please register here by Wednesday, June 9 at 4:00 PM (EST). Please include your name, title, company name and phone number. You will be contacted by email with the toll free telephone number and the conference code.
